description: Perform Leave-One-Out Cross-Validation (LOO-CV) for the model 'food_exp = const + income' using the 'food.gdt' dataset (40 observations). Calculate the Mean Squared Prediction Error (MSPE) and Root Mean Squared Prediction Error (RMSPE) based on the out-of-sample errors. Save a summary file to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/cv_results.txt containing the text 'MSPE: <value>' and 'RMSPE: <value>'. Save the individual predictions, including the actual 'food_exp' and the predicted values, to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/cv_predictions.csv.
